title: Yeet That
description: Pick a block up. Aim. Yeet That.
body:
# Yeet That

**Yeet That** is a simple fun mod about throwing blocks.
Pick up any block, aim and throw!
![A player throwing a stone block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9e0232172d57e68d9dc8b9faed9ced3c32eb3ad.png)
## How?
Set your throw key as any key (standard is _Z_).

Press your throw key to charge and release to yeet that block! The longer you hold the further you throw.


by [Qwatrum](https://github.com/Qwatrum)
